messages.message: I propose coordination between Italy and France in the Adriatic. I will support your moves into Marseilles if you assist me in securing Tuscany. Let me know if this interests you.
Hi Italy! The standard IA is always in the way, so I'm happy to go another route if you're interested.
I have no interest in conflict with Austria at this time. If you move toward Venice or Trieste, I expect you will respect my territorial claims.
Hi Germany! I find IA to be a really solid long term strategy. It's very easy to stop a Juggernaut once Russia and Turkey are at odds. I'd be happy to work with you for that if you're interested.

Hello Russia!
I think a juggernaut could work well here, how would you feel about bouncing in the black sea to start things off?

Hello Austria!
I think we can find some common ground here if we can come to an agreement for splitting the balkans.

Hey Turkey, I think a bounce in Bla is a good idea!
I would love to play a juggernaut, I think it's an alliance that is seriously underrated and can do well with almost any set of players! Do you think we could do something like a DMZ in Arm instead?

Hey France!
I think our countries have a lot to gain from working together, so I'm going to ask you straight up- are you ok with Dmzing the channel?

Hello Italy!
I hope we can work together this game, I'd like to know your plans regarding Austria.

Hello Germany!
I know we don't border each other, but I'd like to know your plans regarding Austria, as well as Russia

Hello France!
I know we don't border each other, but I'd like to know your plans regarding Italy, as well as your relations with England.

Hello England!
I know we don't border each other, but I'd like to know your plans regarding Russia and France, as well as your relations with Germany

Hey Austria,
I think you're right in that as an alliance we are very strong but also keep each other in check as neighbors, so let's keep a very healthy and friendly relationship!
Your presence in the eastern Mediterranean is clear. I intend to strengthen my position in southern Italy. I expect no aggression from you.

Hey England,
How about an alliance between us? I'm always open for trying something new!
Your opening is welcome. I have no interest in conflict, but I will require clear assurances regarding your movements near Venice or Trieste. I expect we can reach an understanding.

Hi Turkey! I'm happy to split it any way that works for you. It's important for me to secure two builds this year, so I'm happy to give you a path into the Mediterranean in exchange for one. That would allow you to deal with Russia by sea and me to handle Italy by land.

Alternatively, I could open against Italy in a hard way, as Italy has stated, and then we'd be free to divide things up however you'd like.

Hello Turkey,
I am not sure how my relationship with Austria and Russia will be. Any thoughts on your side?

Hey France,

I think it would be better for us to stay on good terms, what do you think?

Hey Russia,

I would like to stay on good terms, any thoughts on this?

Hey Germany!
I would love to ally with you. As England, I'm always looking for allies, and I feel like our countries work well together. Are you willing to help me into Belgium?
Well, not now in 1901, but I will surely help you in the next year, is that ok? I want to get Holland first. How does this sound to you?
Of course. I'll be opening hard against Russia and trying to take Rumania while covering Trieste with my fleet, so I'll be out of your hair.

Hi Turkey! I don't think I have any plans regarding Italy yet, but it definitely wouldn't be opposed to having one. As for England, I think the way the board usually goes it'll be pretty clear after the first turn where my allegiances lie.

I'd be happy to share information with you though!

Hey Italy,

What do you think about an alliance between us? I think we can be really strong.
Hi Germany! I think that is a good idea. What do you say we DMZ Burgundy?
Haha you might want to send this message to the right game

Hello Turkey!
I haven't talked much to Russia yet. I'm open to taking him out if you are.
However, I'm not certain about my position with France. I'm still waiting for him to respond
Great, I'll share what I get
Great, I'll let you know what I hear
I would love it if you could help me get Belgium in the fall. I will be taking Norway, but I don't want Russia getting too strong in the North
Hey Germany, that would be excellent!
That sounds like a plan! Let's do that
Haven't gotten much from either besides a bounce in the black sea, Russia says they're open to taking out Austria, but I'll see what they do next turn. Austria seems quite cautious.
Great, sounds good!
Awesome, glad to hear!
Great to hear!
I appreciate your message. My focus is securing southern Italy and the western Mediterranean. I see no reason for us to conflict, provided your ambitions remain eastward.

An alliance between Italy and Germany interests me, provided it is clear and mutually beneficial. I require concrete support from you—such as assistance in securing Tuscany or the Adriatic—before I commit. Let me know your proposals.

My previous message was sincere—I am proposing coordination between Italy and France in the Adriatic. If you are interested, I suggest a mutual defense of Tuscany and support for your movement into Marseilles. Let me know if you are willing to pursue this.
I'm leaning towards Greece, but we'll see after opening moves
I expect clarity on your intentions near Trieste and Venice. If you do not move aggressively toward those areas, I propose mutual non-interference along our border. Confirm your stance.
They will, Russia and I are in agreement about attacking Austria, would you like to join us?
I remain open to an alliance with Germany if you provide clear support in securing Tuscany or the Adriatic. Propose specific assistance and I will respond directly.
Yep. Moving to Gal and Trieste.
Okay. I'm not interested in Greece, so you're welcome to it. I'm aiming to secure Rumania.
I reiterate my proposal for coordination in the Adriatic. If you support my move to Tuscany, I will back your push toward Marseille. Confirm your commitment.
Hi England! I am definitely okay with that.

I appreciate your invitation, but my focus remains on securing southern Italy and the western Mediterranean. I do not wish to commit to a front against Austria at this time unless it directly benefits my interests.
Sounds good

Your movement toward Galicia and Trieste is noted. I will expect clear assurance that you do not intend to threaten Venice or Trieste directly. I am open to non-aggression along our border if your intentions are peaceful.

I propose a concrete agreement: if your army moves toward Marseilles, I will support it via A VEN S A MAR - PIE. In return, I ask for your support in securing Tuscany via A MAR S A ROM - TUS. Confirm if you accept these terms.
Understandable
Great! Could you support me into Belgium in the Fall?
I remain open to coordination with Germany if you are willing to commit forces toward the Adriatic or Tyrol to relieve pressure on me. Specify what support you can offer, and I will respond directly.

If you do not move aggressively toward Trieste or Venice, I propose mutual non-interference along our border. I will support your movement toward Galicia if you do not threaten my Adriatic holdings. Confirm your position.

I appreciate your invitation, but my immediate interests lie in securing southern Italy and the western Mediterranean. Unless your campaign against Austria directly benefits my position in the Adriatic or Tyrrhenian Sea, I cannot commit. Let me know if such opportunities arise.

Your movement toward Galicia and Trieste is noted. I accept your apparent non-aggression toward Venice and Trieste. In exchange, I expect no interference from you in the Adriatic. I will support your push toward Galicia if needed.

Hello Italy!
Just wanted to touch base and see what your plans were regarding Austria and France
Hey Austria, I know our relations are sometimes tense, but do you think we could DMZ Gal?

I propose again: if your army moves toward Marseilles, I will support it via A VEN S A MAR - PIE. In return, I ask for your support in securing Tuscany via A MAR S A ROM - TUS. Confirm if you accept these terms.

Hello Austria!
Just wanted to touch base and see what your plans were regarding Italy and Turkey
Deal.

My focus is securing southern Italy and the western Mediterranean, with coordination opportunities with France in the Adriatic. I expect Austria to remain neutral along our border. I see no immediate reason for conflict with any power.

I reiterate my proposal: if your army moves toward Marseilles, I will support it via A VEN S A MAR - PIE. In return, I ask for your support in securing Tuscany via A MAR S A ROM - TUS. Confirm if you accept these terms.
Hey England, I hope we can get along in the north!

Hi England! Glad to hear from you!

Italy and I are friendly for now. Turkey wants to grab Greece. Haven't heard much else. Have you heard anything useful?
That sounds good to me! I will be taking Norway, but I have no other interest in Scandinavia
Okay that sounds good!
Hey Russia! I think we probably should bounce there.
Possibly, I haven't heard from Germany yet though.
Great!

Confirmed. I accept your coordination terms. I will issue the order A VEN S A MAR - PIE to support your move toward Marseilles. In return, I expect your order A MAR S A ROM - TUS to secure Tuscany for me. Let me know if you will proceed accordingly.
Sure, I'm fine with that!
My focus is securing southern Italy and coordinating with France in the Adriatic. I expect Austria to remain neutral along our border, and I see no immediate reason for conflict with any power.

Confirmed. I accept your coordination terms. I will issue the order A VEN S A MAR - PIE to support your move toward Marseilles. In return, I expect your order A MAR S A ROM - TUS to secure Tuscany for me. Let me know if you will proceed accordingly.

Confirmed. I accept your coordination terms. I will issue the order A VEN S A MAR - PIE to support your move toward Marseilles. In return, I expect your order A MAR S A ROM - TUS to secure Tuscany for me. Let me know if you will proceed accordingly.
My plans involve securing Tuscany and coordinating with France in the Adriatic. I expect Austria to remain neutral along our border. I see no reason for conflict with England at this time.
Perfect!
I have talked with Germany a little, but he hasn't told me anything concrete
Your 'Deal' is noted. I expect you to respect my holdings near Trieste and Venice. I will support your movement toward Galicia if needed.

Confirmed. I accept your coordination terms. I will issue the order A VEN S A MAR - PIE to support your move toward Marseilles. In return, I expect your order A MAR S A ROM - TUS to secure Tuscany for me.
Hm. Well let's see how the first turn plays out
I haven't heard anything yet, but I will keep you updated. I think Italy and France are coming after you
Confirmed
Ok. How are you feeling about Italy?
Also, are you planning on going for Greece?
Thanks a lot!
Well they seem pretty cool. We might be able to work out a Western Triple.

Confirmed. I will issue A VEN S A MAR - PIE to support your move toward Marseilles. Regarding Greece, I do not intend to pursue it directly at this time. My priority is securing Tuscany and southern Italy. If your campaign in the south creates opportunities for us to coordinate further, I am open to considering shared goals.
I'll support you into Greece next year.
Hm. That's annoying, but probably the case. Hopefully Germany is an ally.
Ok thanks for the update!
Thank you!

I will issue A VEN S A MAR - PIE to support your move toward Marseilles. I expect you to follow through with A MAR S A ROM - TUS to secure Tuscany for me. Let me know once you've confirmed your orders.
That's cool. I'm pretty neutral on it, as I can help against Russia but not really get anything out of it
Will Turkey be helping you against Russia?
Ok cool. I know we're not really going to be interacting much anytime soon, but I wanted to let you know that I'm open to any mutually beneficial arrangements at any time
I mean it usually works out for the three of us, just would have to include Germany

Your offer to support me into Greece next year is noted. For now, I expect continued non-aggression along our border, particularly near Trieste and Venice. I will respect your movement toward Galicia.
I have!
Ok that sounds good to me
Cool! We'll figure it out when we get there
Alright!
Hey Italy, just wanted to wish you good luck!
Hey France, just wanted to wish you good luck!
Russia seems to be quite aggressive in its messages, maybe I should help Austria if they really are aggressive.
Sure, I can help you in the fall!
That is great!
Thank you!
Perfect.
Hey Russia! Thanks and good luck to you too!
I'm trying to convince him to open against Russia. I think I've convinced him I'm more useful than Russia.
Alright, sorry, I was really busy! Yes, I can offer you that.
Ok cool
Turkey is the one person in this game I trust least. He's literally never responded to my messages.
Hey Austria! Just wanted to wish you good luck!
Yeah that's true. He sent me one message but that's it
Hi France! Same to you! Any chance you're going to fight Italy?
Ha. Well, hopefully he'll pay attention soon.
Oh that's unfortunate
If you're interested, I'd be open to opening hard against Italy. If you move to Pie and me to Tyr, we should be able to take Venice in the fall.

I've spoken to France about going after Italy. He doesn't seem to have any interest in fighting Germany so that puts you in a tough spot I guess. It'd be helpful if you could keep them busy, at least for the time being.
Good to know, they're playing very friendly with me
Yeah Italy has told me the same thing. He also told me that he has no plans to attack you. I don't have any contact with Russia yet
Are you going to be bouncing Russia out of Sweden?
Of course, and I will do the same

Hmmm I'm interested, but I would prefer to wait a turn and get a build. If I commit to going to war with Italy right off the bat, I will probably only get Spain and Portugal. I'm not opposed to this plan though, I just need to think it over a little more.
England also seems to be friendly.
Maybe I should, I am still thinking about it.
Good to know
I'd keep an eye on Italy
Either way is fine with me
Interesting. I'll talk to him.
It would be nice if he would respond to me
Agreed.
Looks like France is going to be a no show.
Yep
Thanks for the advice
Cool
Really? That's odd...
Yep.
I hate when that happens.
Yeah, it's kind of cheap of France...
Yeah. Hopefully he shows up.

ITALY: A VEN S A MAR - PIE

messages.message: Any chance you're open to helping me with Germany?
That was pretty disappointing.
I'm afraid I have to cover my home centers, but I'm interested in helping you against Italy next year.
Hm. Well, that's not what I was hoping for.
Sorry mate. You can still get Greece this turn though
Looks like you've got a western triple to deal with, so maybe I'll leave you alone.
Alright that's fine, I understand
Your commitment to neutrality along our border is noted. I trust we both uphold our agreement, as I remain focused on southern expansion and intend to move toward Trieste soon.
Looks like Russia and Austria are quite aggressive
Also, could you support me into Bulgaria?
Yeah, there's a Western Triple brewing so I'm going to try to deal with that.
Well, a WT is an interesting development. Do you mind if I grab Warsaw?

Alright, sounds good!
If I were you, I would take Gre this turn with Alb, but I could do without telling you how.
Yeah, I was considering that.
I am moving against Russia. I will help you in 1902.
I'm planning to support myself into Greece. Any objection?
Will you convoy Yorkshire to Belgium? Then I can give you the support.
Yeah I'll convoy to Belgium. Will you also bounce Russia out of Sweden?
True. It depends on if I want to throw my lot in with Turkey or Russia.
I don't mind at all.
Yes
I'll be bouncing Italy then
Sounds good.
Thanks!
Great!
What are your thoughts?
No worries
Do you think we could have a bounce in Gal?
So, do you want Belgium?
Sure!
Thank you!
Yeah I'm planning on convoying to Belgium. Would you be ok with that?
I think you should attack Turkey. I don't like it when he gets big, and he seems to be set up for an attack on you
Just FYI, there's an English-german alliance and a Western Triple alliance. They're all going to work together to crush Russia and then turn on the rest of us.
I was thinking the same thing. I'll take Greece this year and move for Serbia.
Hi Germany! I'm going to be moving Picardy back to Brest to cover it. I was thinking you and I could work together?
Cool! I think it would be good if you also got Germany to bounce Russia out of Sweden
Your vague promises are not enough. If you intend to offer an alliance, you must do more than apologize and say 'alright.' Show me concrete support, or I will assume your silence means indifference.
He already said he was
Italy will advance toward Trieste this Fall. My army from Venice will move north, coordinating with your Adriatic fleet. Stand ready to support me—we must act swiftly before Austria regroups.
It seems like I need to defend Munich.
I'm not sure, I want to keep it in my pocket for now.
Sure, go for it.
Alright
Ok cool. Thanks!
Ok, but if you move to Tuscany again I'm going to have to move to Marseilles. I'm trying to keep our alliance as transparent as possible.
Alright, thanks!
No problem! I'm assuming you'll be convoying from Edinburgh?

Understood. I will not move on Tuscany again unless it is absolutely necessary—I trust your coordination in Marseilles. Let’s proceed with our plan to take Trieste. If Austria resists, we will meet them head-on together.
If you'd still be open to helping me with Italy, Italy told me that they were moving to Trieste. Now, I don't know if this is a lie or not, but I wanted to give you a heads up.
Thanks for the warning
Austria's asked me to bounce you out of Greece, but if you allow me to take it, I'll support you into Austria
Italy has told everyone else he's moving to Trieste, so I think it's a lie.
Actually, I think I'd prefer to move to Bud this turn.

Your 'Western Triple' may be a distraction, but I will not forget our agreement. If you attempt to break neutrality or divert your forces toward Galicia while mine are in Trieste, I will respond accordingly. I am not interested in war, but I am not afraid of it.

You are free to defend Munich as you see fit. But know this—if you stand idle while France and I take Trieste and push into central Europe, you will find yourself facing both of us. I prefer alliances over burdens—I hope you decide wisely.
It's annoying that you and Germany aren't going to fight, though. There's a clear Juggernaut and English-german alliance going on, which is bad news for the rest of us.
Yep. Have you spoken to Germany about a Western Triple?
No, I don't think they're interested in it
Yea England is attacking Russia and Germany is probably allied with England
It looks like you're attacking Russia?
Yeah, I think that's the plan
Sounds good
Don't worry. I've got my hands full with Russia and Turkey. The WT is clearly real, but the English-german alliance is far more threatening.
I have to cover my home center anyway.
How do you plan on dealing with Italy?
Well I plan on working with Austria to take them down
This is why the Lepanto is so important.
Just FYI, Austria's told me there's an English-german-austrian alliance

I will not allow you to take Greece. My focus remains on Trieste and southern expansion—I will not divert to defend Greece for your benefit. If you wish to support me against Austria, you must act in ways that are strategically meaningful to me. Supporting a move into Trieste would be far more valuable.

Your hands may be full, but I will not be distracted by your alliances or your wars elsewhere. I have made my intentions clear—I will move toward Trieste this Fall. If your forces remain in place, I will assume your neutrality is intact. If they move toward me, I will act accordingly.
Fair enough, that is a more strategically sound decision.
Yea I have no idea what Italy is thinking
Alright, sounds good!
Wow, thanks! Do you think we could bounce again in Bla?

I appreciate your understanding. My focus remains on securing Trieste and expanding northward. If your fleet ever supports my Adriatic ambitions, I will take note. Until then, I will ensure no one interferes with my goals.
Alright cool
Do you think you'll need my help? It looks like you might be able to take Venice on your own.
How about you? Are you allied with Germany?
Yeah, let's keep it up
Alright, sounds good.
Understood
Actually, would you mind if I don't support you? I want to cover Warsaw just in case.
Your home center is your concern. I remain focused on Trieste. If your forces remain in place, I will not interfere. If you move against me, do not expect mercy.
I should be fine.
I'm taking Greece this turn, Austria has told me they're going to move back to defend Trieste
Ah, that's interesting...
Ok. Sounds good.
Ok that sounds good! I'll be happy to coordinate with you
Well, that wasn't nice of you...
Sorry, didn't want to make things too easy for you, if that makes sense...
Thanks a lot.
Ok sounds good
I do not consider my response a threat. I am not intending to fight you.
It's up to you whether you believe that or not.
Are you going to fight Germany?
I am finalizing my Fall orders to move from Venice toward Trieste. I expect your fleet to be in position for coordination. Let me know if your Adriatic forces are ready to support the push.
Well, I'm busy and I don't want to upset my neighbors... maybe later, I will help you.
Hmmm. I still haven't decided
Ok awesome
Belief is not the point. My army is moving toward Trieste this Fall. If your forces remain neutral, I will not trouble you. If they do not, I will assume you are the enemy.
He hasn't responded to my messages yet. I'm not 100% sure if I trust him
Why did you do that then?
Your busyness is noted. But remember—I will not wait forever. If you do not act, France and I will.

It was just too tempting...
For all I know, you could've opened to Sil and Pru, so I didn't want to get hosed.
My orders are set: Army from Venice will move toward Trieste this Fall. I expect your fleet to be in place to support this push. Confirm your orders so we may proceed in perfect coordination.
Ok
Yeah, it's possible Austria's lying to me so I'll still take Greece, but if they aren't lying to me then they're not going to be moving back to defend it, I can support myself there.
Ok I'm moving to Western Med, to go to MAO and then to Portugal and holding Spain
I'd be willing to support you into Munich.
I have made my intentions clear. My army is moving toward Trieste. If your forces remain neutral, I will not trouble you. If they do not, I will assume you are the enemy.
You have had your chance to speak. If you stand idle, do not expect to remain unchallenged when France and I take Trieste and press northward.
I'd rather not, thanks though
No problem.

Your busyness is noted. But remember—I will not wait forever. If you stand idle while France and I take Trieste and press northward, you will find yourself facing both of us. I prefer alliances over burdens—I hope you decide wisely.
My orders are set: Army from Venice will move toward Trieste this Fall. I expect your fleet to be in position to support this push. Confirm your orders so we may proceed in perfect coordination.
Okay, good luck!
I have finalized my orders for Fall 1901: Army from Venice will move toward Trieste. I expect your fleet to be ready to support the push. Confirm your coordination so we may proceed without delay.
Man, that was so rude of you.
Sorry, I need to cover Munich this turn.
Yea I'm just gonna be supporting myself into Burgundy
Not sure yet
Confirmed—my army from Venice will move toward Trieste this Fall. Your fleet is critical to our coordination. Let me know when your forces are in position so we can act decisively.
But what do you think about Italy? They seem really hostile in their messages to me.
My message was direct, not rude. You asked for an alliance and received silence. Now you must decide: support France and me, or stand aside and face the consequences.
I think Italy is chill
You too!
Will you be building any fleets in Brest?
As you wish.
Ok, will do!
I'm going to move Marseilles to Spain instead of holding
Well, you are absolutely right. I think we can work together in the future.
No, I'll probably build an army there.
That seems like a good idea to me as well.
Confirmed—my army from Venice will move toward Trieste this Fall. Your fleet is critical to our coordination. If your forces are in position, we can act decisively together.
I notice you will move your army from Marseilles to Spain instead of holding. That should not affect our coordination in the Adriatic, but confirm your fleet is ready to support my move on Trieste.
Hey England, just wanted to check in. Do you have any idea what Germany is up to?
Not really. He hasn't responded to any of my messages yet
Ok cool
Looks like England and Germany have allied, which means Germany could grow quite strong. Just a heads up
We might have to stop them before they get rolling
Okay, thanks.
No problem. I'll try to let you know
Ok, so I talked to France about the Western Triple idea, and he seems pretty cool with it. What do you think?
Thanks, I appreciate it.
No problem
Looks like Germany and England have allied, which means Germany could grow quite strong. Just a heads up
Looks like France and Germany have allied, which means Germany could grow quite strong. Just a heads up
Your polite agreement means little if you do not act. If you do not support France and me now, you must understand that I will not wait for your future promises.
Ok, thanks for the heads up

Germany and England's alliance is indeed concerning, but it is not my immediate concern. My focus remains on Trieste and securing southern Europe. If Turkey wishes to act in concert with me, it would be more productive to support my Adriatic ambitions than to warn me of distant threats.
Hey Italy, if you wanted to grab Gre, you probably could, just to give you a heads up.
Also, I could ask you the same thing...

Your polite words mean little if they are not followed by action. I have no patience for vague promises or delayed cooperation. If you truly wish to work together, support France and me now—before Trieste falls into our hands. Otherwise, I will assume your silence means you prefer to stand aside and watch.

Your suggestion is noted, but Greece is not my priority. My focus remains on Trieste and northern Italy. If you believe you can support me in the Adriatic or against Austria, I would welcome your input. Until then, I will act independently.
I will support you.
If you want, but I'm not sure if I'll be able to do it this turn.
Well, sorry for being so rude.
Support is not a vague promise—it is an action. If you intend to support France and me in Trieste, confirm your orders now. If your words remain idle, I will proceed with France alone.
I am supporting you.
Alright, fair enough.
If you claim uncertainty, then do not claim interest. My path is clear—I am moving toward Trieste this Fall. If you cannot act decisively, I will not wait for your hesitation.
That's alright, no hard feelings!
Your support is noted, but actions remain the measure of commitment. If you intend to stand with France and me on Trieste, confirm your orders now. I will not wait for future gestures.
Hey Italy. You need to watch out for Turkey, I think he is trying to set up to attack you
Not sure if he will succeed though
Thanks!
How's your relationship with England?
I confirmed it.
Good, I hope. We should be good to work with!
You seem to have the best positions, this is going really well for you!
It is, thanks! I think you've done quite well yourself!
Just wanted to give you a heads up, but I'm going to have to move back to War. I'm telling you this so that you know I'm not stabbing you, just giving you a heads up.
You will have my support next turn
I hope it continues that way.
I don't think I have really. I'm probably going to be invaded by someone at some point, although I can't predict who just yet.
Do you think Austria?
Yep, I do.
I have a bad feeling about it.
Well, if they don't I think I'm in good shape, so I guess we'll just have to wait and see.
Yep

Hey France, have you heard anything about what is happening in the east?
We seem to have a bunch of hostile countries around me...

Hey Italy, have you heard anything about what is happening in the east?
We seem to have a bunch of hostile countries lying to me...

AUSTRIA: A SER S F ALB - GRE
ENGLAND: F NTH C A YOR - BEL

messages.message: Thank you, I really appreciate your honesty.
I appreciate your support, but I must remain focused on securing southern Europe. If Greece becomes a point of contention, we may need to discuss how to divide influence before conflict arises.
I have not seen any immediate threats in the east, but I remain focused on maintaining stability in southern Europe. If your situation changes, I will listen carefully.
I propose we solidify our coordination targeting Trieste in Spring 1902. With your support, I will commit fully to capturing it, securing our northern flank together.
Yep, I'll support you into Trieste in spring 1902

I appreciate your support. In Spring 1902, I will move decisively into Trieste with your backing. Let’s plan to coordinate our movements precisely to ensure Austria cannot interfere. I suggest we confirm specific orders by the movement phase.
I am sorry, I was being tricked by Italy and France.
Ok sounds good

Your honesty is noted, but honesty alone does not build alliances. I remain focused on securing Italy’s interests, particularly in central Europe. If your path leads toward my territory, I will not stand aside.

I confirm my commitment to capturing Trieste with your support in Spring 1902. Let’s finalize the coordination of our forces to ensure Austria cannot interfere. I suggest we outline precise orders soon.
I don't think lying in 1901 is ever a good idea.
I am not attacking you.
I hope you don't mind too much.
No problem. I'll have to cover myself now though.
Haha. A 4 way bounce. Interesting.
I know
Italy really is being annoying.
Agreed. Sorry about Warsaw, but it seemed like the logical thing to do.
Thanks a lot! I hope we can work together as soon as possible.
I have no interest in Greece, it's all yours
Hmm, I'm not in that bad a shape...
Agreed.

Your assurance is noted, but actions will always outweigh words. I expect you to keep your distance from central Italy. If your forces move toward my territory, I will act decisively to protect my interests.
Well, I must say that I was really tricked by Italy.
Well, what happened there?

You are welcome, and I remain open to cooperation when it aligns with mutual interests. For now, my focus is securing southern Europe. If your path intersects with mine in the future, I will reach out.
Would you help me fight Italy?

I reaffirm my commitment to capturing Trieste with your support in Spring 1902. Let’s plan to coordinate our forces precisely so Austria cannot interfere. Confirm your orders soon so we can finalize this plan.

Italy has secured its positions in southern Italy and remains committed to neutrality along our shared border—for now. My focus is northward, and Trieste is a strategic objective. I hope Austria will remain true to its neutrality and avoid unnecessary conflict.
Hmm... Do you really want a fight?
You are welcome, and I appreciate your openness. For now, my focus remains on securing southern Europe, but I remain open to cooperation if our paths converge in the future.
Yeah, that's not good...
I reaffirm my commitment to capturing Trieste with your support in Spring 1902. Let’s finalize the coordination of our forces soon so we can execute this plan with precision.
Sounds good.
I hope you understand that Trieste is my home center and it is necessary for Austrian survival.
Well, sorry for the miscommunication.

Your offer for cooperation is noted. I intend to move Army VEN to TRI again this fall to maintain pressure on your forces in the region. If you intend to resist, I expect clarity now so we may proceed accordingly.
Ok, that makes sense.
Hmm, I'm not sure I can. I was thinking of using it to support myself into the Baltic.

Your continued pressure on Austria’s southern flank is appreciated. Since Greece remains uncontested, Italy will focus fully on Trieste and southern Italy. If circumstances change, I expect timely communication from you.
What are you planning to do with Gal?

Your confirmation is received. Italy remains focused on Trieste and southern Italy, and I appreciate your acknowledgment of our strategic priorities. Should Germany continue to push westward, Italy will support France fully. Clarity is mutual—expect the same from me.
Ok, I am focused on Russia now, and I have enough to worry about.
Understood. If Greece remains contested due to Austrian or Russian moves, I expect timely communication from you. Until then, I will focus fully on Trieste and southern Italy.
I don't plan to resist you, but I have to think about whether to hold Serbia.
Have you talked to Italy?
I intend to move Army VEN to TRI again this fall to maintain pressure on Austria. Please confirm your movements in the region so we may coordinate effectively.

I appreciate your clarification. If you intend to hold Serbia and not resist me at Trieste, I will proceed with my planned move of Army VEN to TRI. I expect no interference from you, and I will treat your restraint as a sign of respect, not weakness.
Understood
Yes, I've been talking to them
My fleet in WES is going to move to TYR and the fleet in Spain is going to hold.
So what are your plans for this turn?
They claim to be attacking Austria
It's interesting that you said that Turkey and Austria were allied.
Thank you.
I don't really want to have a conflict with Italy right now.
Me neither
I would prefer if they went after Austria.
If I were you, I would try to take Greece this turn, but I don't know how much you trust me or Italy.
I was going to take Greece this turn

Your acknowledgment is noted. Italy remains focused on securing Trieste and southern Italy. Should Germany continue its westward push, Italy will support France fully and without hesitation. I expect clarity from you if your intentions change.
ok, good luck.
Ok
Are you going to try to take Sevastopol with Black Sea and Armenia?

I did not claim Turkey and Austria are allied. I asked England about their relationship, and France remains my priority. I intend to move Army VEN to TRI again this fall to maintain pressure on Austria. Please confirm your plans for coordination.
You are welcome. I understand your restraint, and I will proceed with Army VEN to TRI. I expect no interference from you. If your plans change, I will respond accordingly.
Interesting
My moves haven't changed, but you can still choose to attack me if you wish. I'd prefer it if you didn't, but it's up to you.
Ok, got it.
They told me they were attacking France.
If you have a change of heart, please tell me so that I can change my moves.
I don't have any plans for it yet.
I'm trying to convince Austria to support me into Rum.
I expect clarity from you if your intentions shift. Italy remains focused on Trieste and southern Italy, but I will support France fully if Germany continues westward expansion.
Ok.
It looks like you were right.
Would you be willing to support me into Rum from Gal?

I appreciate your continued restraint. I intend to move Army VEN to TRI again this fall. I expect no interference from you at Trieste. If you choose to resist, I will respond accordingly. Until then, I treat your restraint as a sign of respect.
Yes, if you're willing to move Gal-sil and help me fight Germany.
I need to defend War from Germany.
I intend to move Army VEN to TRI again this fall. Please confirm your plans for coordination in the region. I remain committed to securing Trieste with your support.
Ok. I can help you take Rum next year.
Yeah. It doesn't look like you will be around for much longer
Ok. I'm supporting you to Greece.
Thanks.
Did you see that move into Romania?
Try to get Italy to help you
Is there any way we can call a truce?
But, if I don't continue westward expansion, will you support me?
I don't think either of us benefits from this war.
Yeah
Well, I don't know...
Well, I guess that didn't work...
I'm trying to talk with him as well
So does that mean you would be willing to agree to a truce?
I'm going to move to the Tyrrhenian Sea with my fleet.
Hey Russia, we're in a stalemate
Would you like to call a truce?
I'm sorry but, no.
Sure, sounds good. I don't think we're getting anywhere.
Alright, I can understand that.
I will continue attacking you from Fin though.
Actually, I can help you take it this year. I'll support Gal-rum.
However, it doesn't benefit you if you and England continue to attack me.
Ok, sounds good. Thanks!
Well, it does for England.
Italy told me that he plans to move Ven-tri. He won't get far, though.
Is there any way you could use Ser to support Gal to Rum as well?
Well, so does you're alliance with France.
I'm sorry, but I have to use Ser to support Alb-gre.
Well, I would consider it if you could get France on board.
Russia just told me that he is going to keep attacking Norway
I'll see what I can do.
Ok, thanks.
Yeah
No problem.
I'm going to continue attacking you until you leave the Black Sea.
Italy threatened to attack me if I didn't comply.
But I think France won't listen to me.
Ok, that's fine.
Thanks.
I'll try to convince them...
I can agree to that. As long as you don't attack me this turn
So you're supporting me into Rum from Gal, right?
Alright, sounds good.
He told me that he is going to continue to attack you
I know that, but he won't be able to make much progress.
I would watch out for Turkey, by the way
Oh ok
Alright.
Have you heard anything from them?
He can move to Tyrolia and then support himself into Trieste
Not much...
Thanks, I will.
Thanks
No problem
Ok, they don't seem interested in my offer.
What did you offer them?
I have Vie and Bud.
I've made a deal with Russia.
Yep. I'm supporting Gal-rum.
Ok, good. You two should be able to take Turkey
Yeah.
How much do you trust Russia?
I was wondering if you would be willing to help out against Turkey.
Were you offering them England?

A BUD S A GAL - RUM
ENGLAND: F SKA S F NTH - DEN

RUSSIA: F SWE S F SKA - DEN
A RUM S A GAL - BUD

messages.message: I think it would be better to just hold.
Do a Support hold on Ukraine, and then support Galicia into Rumania.
I'm not sure. I'm willing to trust them, as long as they don't move Gal-bud.
I'm sorry, I don't remember.
I guess you weren't lying.
It's ok. I got them to agree to the truce.
Yeah, I'm doing that.
Thank you for the tip.
I wasn't. Sorry about that
No problem.
Good, I just don't want you to become a juicy target
You and Turkey can take Sevastopol this year
Ok, if you keep working with me, you can have Tunis.
That depends on Italy, though.
Yeah. You should be able to deal with them though
What's with moving to the Ruhr?
You're probably going to fight me, but you should reconsider. I know I've been attacking you, but you still have a very strong defensive position. I can help you take out England.

Italy remains focused on securing Trieste and southern Italy. Should Germany continue westward expansion, Italy will support France fully and without hesitation. I expect clarity if your intentions change.
I'm not sure, I will probably accept your offer.
Nice
I can take Tri back if Italy leaves me alone. I can't take Rum without letting Turkey take Bul.
Ok, good luck!

I accept your offer for Tunis, provided you hold firm along the Adriatic to prevent Austrian reinforcement to Trieste. Coordination is vital—we cannot allow Austria to reclaim TRI now. I will ensure my forces remain positioned to support our shared objective.
I don't know why that message sent twice.
Thanks
My message was clear: Italy will stand firm with France against any aggression. If your intentions toward the west remain hostile, we will act accordingly. No further clarification is needed from me.
Understood. I will maintain pressure on Trieste and ensure my forces remain in position to support your southern front. I accept your terms—let’s proceed with coordination on Tunis.

My message stands: Italy will support France fully against any aggression. If your intentions remain unchanged, I expect you to act accordingly. Silence is not acceptable if your plans threaten our interests.
Ahh. Good point
I wish you'd responded to me, but I'm glad you moved out of Ven.
I will keep working with you. I intend to maintain pressure on Trieste and hold Tuscany firm to support our coordination on Tunis. Let’s proceed with mutual clarity.
Please leave my Scs alone and I'll leave you alone.
Italy may not trust me now. I'll see if I can convince him to leave me alone.
My movement out of Ven was strategic, not a sign of retreat. If you seek neutrality, maintain your focus eastward and leave Italy’s Adriatic ambitions unchallenged.
I think he already doesn't trust you, but I'll talk to him too
Ok.
He wants me to leave the Adriatic.
Your supply centers are your concern, but Trieste remains mine. If you wish for peace, you will not contest my Adriatic ambitions. If you choose otherwise, I will not hesitate.
Ok. I will hold in Tyr and Tus.
Oh. Just take it back then
If you change your mind, I'll be open to talks.
I can try.
I am not interested in attacking France, I am trying to eliminate England.
Well, Italy and Russia want me to turn on you.
Ok

Understood. I will maintain pressure on Trieste and ensure Tuscany remains secure to support your southern front. I expect your fleet in Tyr to deter Austrian movement toward TRI. Coordination is key—we must not allow Austria to reclaim it now.
I will vacate the Adriatic.
Although, I'm probably not long for this world...

Your focus on England is immaterial to me, so long as you do not threaten France or my interests in the south. If your westward buildup interferes with France’s security, Italy will stand with them. Do not test our clarity.

If you vacate the Adriatic, then Trieste must remain unchallenged. I expect your forces to withdraw eastward and leave TRI open. If you honor this, Italy will not contest your neutrality in the region.
I will move Tri-bud and you can move Ven-pie or something.

I have no interest in negotiation through vague suggestions. If you wish to maintain your conditional neutrality, you will allow Italy to hold Trieste unchallenged. Any attempt to reclaim TRI will be met with force.
But why are you threatening France? I thought you two were allies.
Fair enough.
Of course they do.
You can bounce me out of Tri with Tyr if you like.
Well, if you turn on me, you will be fighting Italy, Russia and me.
Maybe. Turkey's pressure might help you.

England is not my concern, nor is your campaign against them. But if your aggression toward France becomes clear, Italy will act decisively to support our ally. I expect no interference in our Adriatic ambitions.
I don't want to fight you, so let's try to fix this.
I am moving out of Tyrolia
Bouncing you out of Trieste is not a favor—I intend to keep it permanently. If your fleet moves westward toward Tyr, I will not retreat. Coordinate with France and expect me to hold.
What do you mean "bounce me out"?
You claim neutrality, but your presence near Trieste contradicts it. Either vacate the Adriatic or prepare for continued pressure from Italy.
Ok. I'll move to Alb.
Moving out of Tyrolia is irrelevant to me, but if your westward expansion threatens France, I will act decisively. Do not assume I will remain silent.
Or I can support Tyr-ven if you like.

I mean exactly what I said: you were bounced out of Trieste by Italy's forces, and I intend to keep it. If you wish to remain neutral, you will not contest my presence there. Alb is fine for you—stay there and leave TRI untouched.
I'm going to move to Alb. I'm glad we worked this out.
Can you move Tyr-ven?
Why do you say that? I don't want to attack France.
Supporting Tyr-Ven is not an option I need right now. My focus is securing Trieste permanently. If you wish to avoid further conflict, stay out of my way and keep your units eastward.
I'm going to move to Alb.
I cannot allow Tyr-Ven movement if it threatens Italy’s hold on Trieste. Keep your focus eastward and leave TRI untouched.
Ok. That's reasonable.
Alb is acceptable if you remain there and do not attempt to reclaim Trieste. I expect no interference.
Your claim to not want to attack France is irrelevant unless you prove it. If your westward buildup threatens France, Italy will stand with them decisively.
Ok, I can see why you don't want to fight me.
What do you think we should do?
Ok. I will not attempt to take Trieste.
Are you planning to take the Aegean Sea?
Maybe build a fleet in Marseilles.

I intend to keep Trieste permanently. If your focus remains eastward and you leave TRI untouched, there is no conflict. As for the Aegean Sea—my interest lies in southern Italy and the Balkans, not Greece. But if Turkey’s ambitions bring them into conflict with yours, I expect no unnecessary escalation from you.
I am no longer a threat to France. I was only a threat to France if you forced me to fight France.
I hope so...
Thanks for the support.
Well, I'm not sure if they will.
That's fair.
I hope they don't disband Armenia...

Your claim is unconvincing and irrelevant to my interests so long as you do not threaten France or Italy’s hold on Trieste. However, if your westward buildup causes France to call on me for support, your neutrality will mean nothing. Prove your intentions through action, not words.
Yeah, I don't know why they moved to Ankara.
I moved out of Tyrolia, I made sure I could get into Silesia. I do not want to attack France.
I'll ask them about it...
Or an army in Paris.

I expect clarity from you: either maintain your conditional neutrality by leaving Trieste untouched, or act decisively to contest it. Vague acceptance will not suffice. If you choose peace, keep your units eastward and do not interfere with my Adriatic ambitions.
Ok, well good luck.
I thought you were against Italy?
I thought that was your plan
Yeah, I was just taking Sevastopol
But now I'm stuck there until I get an army
If you don't move to Burgundy next turn, I'll build an army in Paris.
Well Italy told me that they were going to take Trieste and then attack France
So are you still planning on attacking France?

Your claim to avoid conflict with France is hollow unless you act to prove it. I remain focused on securing Trieste and southern Italy, but if your buildup threatens France’s security, Italy will act decisively in their defense. Prove your neutrality through action, not words.
I am, but my first priority is to fight Austria.
But Italy is attacking Austria right now, you don't have to fight them both at the same time
I was going to help you with Italy once Austria was done, but if you need it for Austria, I understand
That's true. You might be able to get Austria to support you in
I want Austria out of the game before I fight Italy.
Austria is in a pretty bad situation right now
Thanks, I guess.
That's understandable, but I'm not sure how it will affect my relationship with Italy
I'll wait until they make their decision
Would you like me to leave Greece alone?
Thanks, but you're still not going to get it
ok, good luck.
Thanks
Well, they're not attacking France.
True, but it's worth a shot.
So I guess they're just trying to win.
True
I guess so
It is
I appreciate your efforts to stop me, though.
Thanks, but I still plan on taking Romania
Well, if you let me move out of Tyrolia, I can focus on Russia, which is my primary target.
Are you planning on attacking Russia this turn?
Well, maybe we could work together against Italy?
We'll have to see after Austria falls
Ok
I'll talk to you about it
It's not like I can stop you, haha.

I have no intention of attacking France. My focus remains on securing Trieste and maintaining dominance in southern Italy. If Turkey continues to pursue Greek expansion, I expect no interference from Austria in the Balkans, so we may both operate without conflict.
Well, let's wait and see.
I'm not going to attack you if you let me have it
I just realized that I don't think you're in a good position to help me
But will you stop your advance there after you take Trieste?
I can handle Austria, you should work on France
Well, Austria, it seems we have been betrayed by the same people.

I will stop my advance once Trieste is secured, but I will not abandon it. If your focus remains on Greece and Austria, we can coexist without conflict. However, if you attempt to challenge me in the south, I will not hesitate to respond.
Well, I don't know.
Hmm...
Indeed. What do you want to do?
I am. That's why I'm retreating to Skaggerack
What are your thoughts?
I'm not going to leave Tri open, and I'm not going to contest you in the Adriatic.
Do we have a deal?
What's the plan for you this turn?
I assume you're just going to build more fleets and attack Italy?
I'm going to hold in the west and try to fight Austria.
We can talk about it
But for now I'm going to focus on Austria
Why do you ask?
I expect you to handle Austria in the Balkans as you see fit, but do not expect me to ignore France or Italy’s southern interests. Our cooperation is conditional upon mutual non-interference.
Well, I think Italy is the biggest threat to both of us. If you could support me into Trieste, I can try to help you.
I guess, I just don't want Italy to get too strong.
Ok

Let me be clear: if your movement out of Tyrolia is genuine and your focus is Russia, that is fine. But if your westward buildup threatens France, Italy will act decisively to support them. Prove your neutrality through action, not vague claims.
I will not interfere with you if you stop your attack on Austria
I have a plan.

Your message is unacceptable. I intend to hold Trieste permanently, and I will not tolerate half-measures or vague neutrality. If you refuse to leave the Adriatic unchallenged, I expect you to prepare to contest me fully and decisively—not accept a middle ground that leaves my ambitions unfulfilled.
Well, there's no way to be sure that you won't attack me. So I guess I will give you Rum.
If you leave the Black Sea.
I'm just making sure that we can continue our alliance. I was just a little worried about the fleet in Mid-atlantic
You should be able to take Sevastopol
I'm sorry, but I need to use Vie for something else.
Ok. I will not hold the Adriatic, nor will I contest you in it.
You've got nothing to worry about.
I'm just moving it there to be safe.
Ok, I trust you
I trust you about as far as I can throw you
Same here.
I assume you're planning to take Romania next turn?
Don't attack me, alright?
Don't worry about it.
I'll try to help you with Germany if you want.
Or I might build in Brest to fight England.
Ok, thanks

I will stop my advance only when Trieste is secured and remains mine. If you choose to leave the Adriatic unchallenged and focus on Greece, I will respect that—so long as you do not attempt to encroach on southern Italy. Do not expect me to stand down while you demand I do the same.
Now can you move Tyr-ven and leave me alone?
Or you can move Tyr-pie.
I will leave the Black Sea if you let me have Romania
I will try to, but Austria has a lot of armies
I am only going to take Greece
True. You might be able to get Russia to help you
Yes, we have a deal.
Good
Is Austria planning on attacking Romania next turn?

I have no intention of retreating from Venice or altering my course toward Trieste. My forces remain in place as planned. If you wish to remain neutral, then you will not interfere with Italy’s rightful expansion. Any attempt to obstruct me will be met with decisive action.
Are you planning on attacking Russia next turn?
I'm not sure.

I acknowledge your intent to take Greece, and I will not stand in your way provided you do not attempt to expand into southern Italy or the Adriatic. If you attempt to do so, I will act swiftly to protect my interests.
I think they are, but I don't know with certainty.
ok
I could support you if you want
You can have the Adriatic and the Ionian Sea
I think I'm going to attack Italy now
But I'll wait a few more turns

I have no interest in the Adriatic or the Ionian Sea — my sole concern is Trieste. You may take Greece as you wish, but I will not tolerate any attempt to challenge my expansion northward. Our understanding remains clear: leave southern Italy and the Adriatic to me, and I will not interfere with your ambitions in Greece.
I'm not sure yet.
Ok
I think Turkey might stop attacking me.
Understood
That would be good.
I'm not sure. I'll probably be focused on Italy.
Your assurance is noted. I will not interfere with Greece provided you do not attempt to move westward into southern Italy or the Adriatic. Let this be our final agreement on the matter.
That's what I was thinking
This is the final agreement
What? You've just said you'll leave me alone if I leave you alone!
Understandable
Why? You two are in a stalemate and you have other things to worry about
I'm not planning on attacking you
True, and I don't think either of us will benefit from continuing the fight.
I did not say I would leave you alone—I said I would advance toward Trieste and expect you to remain neutral. If you interfere, you will find Italy’s response swift and unyielding.
We're at a stalemate in the north, not the south.
Ok, I won't move into Tyrolia.
Oh ok, thanks for the info.
Thanks
Once Austria falls, we'll see
Ok
Ok. Thanks.
Agreed. Let this be our final word on Greece and southern Italy. I expect you to honor this understanding, as I will honor mine.
I might reconsider in the future, depending on what Italy does.
Ok.
Ok
Italy is acting like an irrational child.
Ok, let's wait and see then.
I will
So how about a truce?
And to stop attacking each other?
Have you and England called a truce?
Your assurance is accepted. Let this be our final agreement on Greece and southern Italy. I expect you to honor this understanding, as I will honor mine.
I've decided that Italy must die.
Nice. I agree.
Agreed. Are you still going to try to take Norway?
Do you think Turkey is on board?
I'll destroy my fleet in the Adriatic if you move Tyr-pie.
Yeah. And he refuses to talk to me
I will stop attacking Nor.
Same.
I did not say I would leave you alone—I said I would advance toward Trieste and expect you to remain neutral. If you interfere, you will find Italy’s response swift and unyielding.
I don't want to stab you in the back, but I don't want you to expand into Austria
It's weird
Ok, thanks

Destroying your fleet in the Adriatic will not deter Italy’s advance. I have no interest in your internal decisions, but I warn you plainly: if you choose to act against me, you will regret it. My forces remain in place, and I expect you to uphold your neutrality. Any aggression toward me will be met with swift and decisive counteraction.
I told you that I will not attack Tri.
Not yet.
I'm getting sick of dealing with him.
He's acting like I betrayed him even though he betrayed me first.
Understandable, although that's difficult for me to do anyway.
Yes, for the time being.

Your assurance is noted, but assurances mean nothing unless they are backed by action. I expect your forces to remain neutral toward Trieste and Venetia. If you attempt to reclaim Trieste, you will find Italy prepared and resolute.
You should build an army in Mun and move it to Tyr next turn.
But I'll try to take Bud or Vie if I have a chance.
Have you and France called a truce?
I will.
Ok, sounds good.
You can move Tri-ven if you like. I don't plan on taking it.
Well it will depend on how the situation unfolds, but Budapest might be taken by Italy and then you'll be too far away from Moscow

Your message is incomplete, but I expect you to clarify your stance soon. Let me be clear: Greece is yours to pursue, but southern Italy and the Adriatic remain off-limits. If you honor this, we will have no further disputes.

Destroying your fleet will not alter Italy's course. I will move into Trieste when I choose, and your neutrality remains conditional upon you not opposing me. If you claim you do not plan to take it, then act accordingly. Any attempt to reclaim Trieste or obstruct Italy's advance will be met with force.
What are you going to do with your build?
You said southern Italy and the Adriatic but not southern Italy
And I'll try to convince Turkey not to fight you.
Yeah...
I expect your neutrality to be honored, not claimed. If you will not attack Trieste, then do not place units to do so. I will not tolerate empty assurances.
I'm not sure what to do with it...
Southern Italy includes Naples and Rome. The Adriatic includes Venetia and Trieste. If you seek clarity, I offer it plainly: leave those to me. Greece is yours.
Do you think it would be possible to not fight Russia for a little while longer?
I'll try to convince Turkey to stop fighting you, but you might want to consider building an army in Moscow to defend.
I might be able to, but why?
I will not attack Trieste.
You want all of Italy?

Your assurance is not enough—your actions must prove your neutrality. If you do not attack Trieste, then do not move units toward it. I expect your forces to remain passive toward Venetia and Trieste. Fail to honor this, and Italy will act accordingly.
Because I'm not ok with that
That's my plan.
So that Russia could help me fight Austria.
But that will let Italy expand even more
They'll take all of Austria and most of Italy
Thanks for the help.
No problem.
I will see if I can do anything in Austria, but I don't know if I'll be able to do anything...
Italy already controls Naples and Rome. Southern Italy is secure and remains mine. The Adriatic is Italy’s sphere of influence. Greece is yours—if you stay west of the Aegean, we will not interfere.
That's fair

Your initial resistance is noted, but your subsequent agreement confirms our understanding. Let me be clear again: Greece is yours to pursue, provided you do not attempt to expand westward into southern Italy or the Adriatic. Naples, Rome, Venetia, and Trieste remain Italy’s interests. If you accept this boundary, we will have no further disputes.
I have given you my assurance.
True, but it would be nice to have Italy, Russia, and I all fighting Austria at the same time.

Your assurance is noted, but words alone will not deter Italy’s advance. If you do not intend to act against me, then do not move units toward Trieste or Venetia. If you attempt to reclaim Trieste, you will find Italy prepared and resolute.
I will not move into Ven or Tri.
It would be nice to have Italy, Russia, and I all fighting Austria at the same time.
Yeah. He probably doesn't understand that you can't always trust people in this game
Yeah, we've got a non-aggression pact
lol

I expect your silence on Venetia and Trieste to remain firm. If your units remain neutral toward those regions, Italy will respect your boundaries. But if you act contrary to this, Italy will act decisively.
I told him I wasn't going to attack him, and that he could move into the Adriatic to attack Turkey, if he wanted.
I have given you my assurances.
I won't move into Ven or Tri.
Probably
I don't know what to do. I'm in a very precarious position.
Your agreement is accepted. Keep your focus on Greece and leave the Adriatic and southern Italy to me. If you honor this understanding, we will have no further disputes.

Your assurances are clear, but your actions will determine whether Italy can trust them. I expect Venetia and Trieste to remain untouched by your forces. If you uphold this neutrality, Italy will respect your boundaries. If not, consequences will follow.
I don't really know either

Your assurance is noted, but neutrality must be proven through inaction. If Venetia and Trieste remain untouched, Italy will respect your boundaries. If your forces attempt to reclaim Trieste or interfere with Italy’s advance, you will find us prepared and resolute.
I'm confused as to why you continue to try to speak aggressively.
It sounds like you want me to commit a specific action.

I do not intend to waste words on confusion. My intent is clear: Venetia and Trieste remain Italy’s objectives. If you will not move into Ven or Tri, then you will not oppose me. If you claim neutrality but act contrary to it, you will find Italy prepared to respond. Silence is acceptable so long as your units remain neutral.
Are you still interested in taking Greece?

Italy’s forces remain poised for Spring’s advance toward Trieste. I expect continued coordination from you along the Adriatic and southern flank. If France supports Italy’s push, Austria will have no choice but to concede. Let us finalize our Spring orders with clarity and precision.
How are you feeling about the game right now?

Your movements eastward are noted. If Germany chooses to shift focus away from Italy, I will not stand in your way—so long as you do not attempt to interfere with Italy’s march toward Trieste. Do not assume I will tolerate incursions into Venetia or the Adriatic.
I have a proposal.
I am not moving towards Italy.

Russia’s silence is noted. If your interests align with limiting Austrian or Turkish expansion, we may find mutual benefit in coordination. Italy remains focused on Trieste, but should circumstances shift, I expect Russia to act decisively where it matters.
I don't really know. I think England and I have made a truce, so that's good.

I do not require your commitment to action—I require your commitment to neutrality. If you do not move toward Venetia or Trieste, I will consider that your commitment. If you do move toward either, Italy will respond accordingly. Your proposal is noted, but it must align with your continued inaction toward Venetia and Trieste.
Ok, good.
True, that would be nice.

If your proposal involves maintaining the current status quo—your forces staying away from Venetia and Trieste—I will accept it. If your proposal includes any movement toward those centers, I will reject it outright.
What are your plans?

Your statement is clear—Germany is not moving toward Italy. I accept that at face value for now, but I will continue to monitor your movements eastward. Should your focus shift toward Venetia or the Adriatic, Italy will not stand idle.
Ok, sounds good. Let me know if you need any help.
I was thinking about focusing more on the South. What about you?
Do you still plan on helping out England in the North?
Yes, I will support you.
We can't let Austria get any bigger.
I'm not sure
I don't plan on doing anything for England, so if you have any ideas, let me know.
Ok, thanks.
Me neither.
I'm not sure what I'll do.
What about that army in Finland?
I'll try to help you.
I will not expand into southern Italy, but I am planning on taking Albania and I'll leave the Adriatic alone. I just need it to attack Austria
Do you have any ideas?

If your fleet shifts toward the Adriatic and isolates Austria’s forces, I will consider tactical cooperation. But remember—I act for Italy’s interests first. Your fleet’s movement must reflect your intent.

If your fleet shifts toward the Adriatic this Spring, I will welcome tactical cooperation. Otherwise, I expect you to remain neutral and not interfere with my advance on Trieste.

You may doubt me, England, but my actions will remain clear and decisive. I do not seek your trust—I seek your neutrality or cooperation where it benefits both of us. If your fleet threatens Austria’s Adriatic line this Spring, I will welcome coordination. Otherwise, stay out of my path.

ok

Confirmed. Your fleet moving to ADR is welcome news. I will proceed with A VEN - TRI as planned. Do not falter now—this is our moment.

Your fleet in the Aegean is not welcome there while Russia is pushing into Bulgaria. Do not fall for their overtures—I expect Budin to remain secure. If you move your fleet toward Constanza, you will leave my flank exposed and force me to act independently. Hold Budin.

Your neutrality is a choice—but your refusal to concede Trieste is a provocation. If you defend it, expect me to take it. If you stand aside, I will not return the favor lightly, but I will not attack you for it. Choose now.

I see your fleet remains firm at ADR—good. My units are secure in ROM, VEN, and NAP. We will move together in Spring 1906. Do not waver now.

Trieste is not merely territory—it is a claim I have secured through action and will defend by force if necessary. If you wish to remain at peace with me, you will not contest it. If you choose otherwise, war is inevitable.

I have no choice but to stay firm.

Russia is advancing aggressively into the Balkans, particularly toward Budin. Your fleet at ADR remains critical to our shared front. We must coordinate closely to ensure Austria remains isolated and unable to reinforce Russia’s flank. Stand firm—I will not waver.

You say you can hold Budin for one more turn, but I require certainty. If you cannot hold Budin firmly next turn, Trieste becomes vulnerable. Your fleet moving to the Black Sea may help deter Russia, but your army must hold Budin. Act decisively—I will not accept half-measures.
Russia has told me he is going to the Black Sea.

Russia’s movement toward the Black Sea is troubling, but it is not a distraction from our shared objective. Your fleet at ADR remains vital to isolating Austria and securing our Adriatic front. If Russia shifts focus to Budin, Turkey must hold firm—I expect your continued coordination with me to ensure neither Austria nor Russia gains ground. Stand firm at ADR, and we will succeed.
You can trust me. I have no choice but to stay firm.

ok, good

You say you need Russia’s help to defend Bulgaria—but Bulgaria is your responsibility, and your ability to hold Budin determines Trieste’s fate. If you cannot hold Budin, do not expect me to hold Trieste against Russia or Austria. Act decisively.

You say you will be firm—I expect nothing less. Your fleet at ADR is critical to isolating Austria and securing our front. Russia’s movement into Galicia threatens our flank, so I expect you to coordinate closely with me moving forward. Stand firm, and we will succeed.

You claim you have had no conversations with Austria—that is good to hear. I will not tolerate any ambiguity or backchannel diplomacy that undermines our alliance. We stand together, and we will act as one.
You asked me not to falter, I am not faltering.
I will fully commit to holding Bud
I am not a threat to you.
Hold Bud

Good. You say you will fully commit to holding Bud. I expect you to do so decisively. If you fail, Trieste becomes untenable and our mutual interests collapse. I will not tolerate weakness—this is your moment.

You claim you are not a threat to me—that is clear from your fleet’s firm position at ADR. I expect you to remain firm and coordinate closely with me. We must isolate Austria and deny Russia any foothold along our shared flank.

You say 'Hold Bud'—I expect you to do exactly that. Russia is advancing, and if Bud falls, Trieste falls next. You must act now with full force. I will not hesitate to act independently if you falter.

I expect your fleet to remain firm at ADR through Spring 1906—I will not tolerate any wavering. Our coordination is the only way to deny Austria reinforcements and secure Trieste. If you act decisively, I will act decisively with you.
I fully intend to hold Bud

Ok, thanks

Your advances into Bulgaria threaten my flank. I will not tolerate pressure on Budin or Trieste. If you seek peace, keep your forces away from my borders. If you do not, I will act accordingly.

If you commit fully to holding Budin, I will stand firm on Trieste and support your position against Russian aggression. But 'act decisively' means nothing if you hesitate. I expect you to declare your intent to hold Budin with full force next turn—no ifs, no maybes.

You say 'If Russia takes Bulgaria, then I will attack Russia'—that is not enough. You must hold Bulgaria now or Trieste becomes vulnerable. If you wait for Russia to act first, you risk everything. I will not support a Turkey that wavers.

Your denial is unconvincing. Your recent coordination with Russia is clear to me and will not be ignored. If you are not aligned with Russia, then explain why you continue to support their moves in the Balkans while ignoring Italy’s interests. Clarify now — or I will treat you as a threat.

You have chosen Russia over Italy. That is clear now. If you aid Austria, you will further isolate yourself from me and weaken your position in the Balkans. I will not allow Russia to control the region at my expense. Clarify once more — do you stand with me or against me?
Do you really think that I have an alliance with Russia?

Denial is not conviction. Your recent coordination with Russia is not a coincidence — it is a choice. If you insist on denying it, then clarify now how your fleet supports Austria’s defense while ignoring Italy’s claim to Trieste. I expect clarity, not evasion.

Your denials are unconvincing. Your recent coordination with Russia is clear to me — whether or not you call it an alliance, your actions speak louder than words. If you want my help, then it must seem as though I am with you.

I will move Army Venice toward Trieste regardless of your intentions toward Germany, but I expect your fleet to hold ADR and ION to prevent Austrian interference. If you cannot commit, I will proceed independently.

I will move Army Venice to Trieste this Spring regardless of your actions elsewhere, but I expect your fleet to hold ADR and ION to prevent Austrian interference. This is not a request—it is a demand if you wish to maintain any coordination. If you fail me again, I will act alone.

Your claim that your intent is to help Germany into Munich is not acceptable if it leaves me exposed to Austrian retaliation. I will move Army Venice toward Trieste this Spring. If your fleet does not control ADR and ION to prevent Austrian interference, then our coordination is over. This is not negotiable.
